allow: PowerShell($env:ANDROID_HOME = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; $timeout = 120; $elapsed = 0; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5; $status = & "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>&1; Write-Host "Elapsed: ${elapsed}s, Status: $status" } while \($status -notmatch "1" -and $elapsed -lt $timeout\); Write-Host "Done: $status")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\Users\\dell\\HIREON\\s22.png"\); $ratio = $img.Width / 540; $newH = [int]\($img.Height / $ratio\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(540, $newH\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($img, 0, 0, 540, $newH\); $g.Dispose\(\); $img.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\Users\\dell\\HIREON\\s22_small.png"\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "Resized to 540x$newH")

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe","C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\); $git=$null; foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { $git=$p; break } }; if \(-not $git\) { $git = \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Git","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -Filter git.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName }; if \($git\) { "GIT: $git"; & $git --version } else { "git.exe NOT FOUND" })
